/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_klaus_65c02.dir/klaus_65c02_extended_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_klaus_65c02.dir/__/M6502.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_klaus_65c02.dir/__/Memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_klaus_65c02.dir/__/SlotBus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_klaus_65c02.dir/__/CassetteDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_klaus_65c02.dir/__/AudioDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_klaus_65c02.dir/__/RomLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_klaus_65c02.dir/__/SnapshotIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_klaus_65c02.dir/__/SpeakerDevice.cpp.o -o test_klaus_65c02  -ldl -lm
